summary: Infrastructure / PFI Projects insurance covering large-scale public infrastructure projects under Private Finance Initiative (PFI) / Public Private Partnership (PPP) structures. Complex multi-party, long-duration policies with step-in rights and lenders' interests.

schemaEntities.description: Infrastructure project entity. Custom: ProjectType, ProjectValue, PFI_ContractRef, SPV_Name, ConcessionPeriodYears, AuthorityName, StepInRightsTrigger, FundingStructure, LenderSyndicate, DBFO_Contractor, OperationalPhaseStart, SubDebtRatio, SeniorDebtRatio, ProjectRating.

138 rules: SPV corporate structure validation, lenders' interest co-insured requirements, step-in rights trigger conditions, DBFO contractor approval, concession period-based premium adjustment, PFI contract alignment checks.
Lender entity. Custom: LenderName, LenderType, DebtTranche, LoanAmount, SecurityPackage, CovenantTriggers, StepInApprovalRequired, InstitutionalLenderFlag.

relationships.note: Lender syndicate interests require co-insured registration -- complex multi-party structure
Coverage driven by 14 project custom fields including SPV and concession structure
138 rules include PFI contract alignment and lender covenant triggers

migrationIssues.detail: InfraProject_INFRA has 14 custom fields for PFI contract structures. No GW Cloud equivalent for PFI-specific entity -- major new entity design required.
LenderEntity_INFRA manages complex lender syndicate co-insured registration. GW Cloud additional insured supports individual parties -- syndicate management requires custom solution.
Long-duration concession period (typically 25-35 years) with annual premium adjustments. GW Cloud multi-year policy support limited -- custom long-duration policy structure required.
Automatic step-in rights trigger conditions linked to SPV financial covenants. GW Cloud workflow engine can support -- complex conditional logic migration required.

cloudMapping.action: PFI contract reference entity requires new GW Cloud design -- regulatory requirement
Lender syndicate entity requires new GW Cloud design -- 4-5 sprint effort
Generic conditional trigger -- PFI-specific step-in logic requires custom workflow
